recap:
- Custom metrics can be defined to evaluate specific aspects of a model, such as detecting personally identifiable information (PII) in retrieval models.
- The `make_genai_metric_from_prompt` function is used to create a custom metric that assesses the presence of PII in retrieved content.
- The custom metric, named `has_pii`, uses a specified prompt to determine if the content contains PII, with a configuration indicating that a lower score is better.
- Evaluation tests can be run using `mlflow.evaluate`, where the custom metric can be included alongside standard evaluation metrics.
- Results from the evaluation can be displayed using `display(eval_results.metrics)` to view the metrics in the console.
- Evaluation results can be accessed through the UI by clicking on the "View evaluation results" tab or by navigating to the "Experiments" section in the left panel.
- Detailed metrics and assessments can be reviewed in the Model Metrics and Evaluation results Preview tabs within the experiment run.
